environmentIssue: This headless Windows Server environment lacks graphical display capability. Electron apps require a windowing system to render their UI. The CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol) connection attempts failed because the Electron process cannot initialize its renderer process without a display. This is a fundamental environmental limitation, not a configuration issue.
recommendation: User testing validation for this Electron desktop application requires a Windows environment with graphical display capability. Consider: 1) Running tests on a Windows desktop with monitor, 2) Using a Windows VM with RDP session, 3) Setting up Xvfb on Linux for headless Electron testing, or 4) Implementing a mock/headless testing approach that tests business logic without UI.
